Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Party.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Party.Builder
Enclosing class:
Party
public static final class Party.Builder extends Object

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Party
    build()
     
    Party.Builder
    cftcDocumentDeliveryPreference(PartyCftcDocumentDeliveryPreference cftcDocumentDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for CFTC documents for a given Party record; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on futures account creation Only applies to CFTC regulated accounts
    Party.Builder
    cftcDocumentDeliveryPreference(Optional<? extends PartyCftcDocumentDeliveryPreference> cftcDocumentDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for CFTC documents for a given Party record; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on futures account creation Only applies to CFTC regulated accounts

    An email address indicated for account communications.

    An email address indicated for account communications.

    Party.Builder
    legalNaturalPerson(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyLegalNaturalPerson> legalNaturalPerson)
    Legal natural person.
    Party.Builder
    mailingAddress(PartyMailingAddress mailingAddress)
    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.
    Party.Builder
    mailingAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyMailingAddress> mailingAddress)
    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.
    Party.Builder
    name(String name)
    The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=party/*}
    Party.Builder
    name(Optional<String> name)
    The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=party/*}
    Party.Builder
    partyId(String partyId)
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single owner or control person on an account; A Party contains account-specific information about a person whereas inside the Party is a reference to a reusable instance of a Person `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` which contains non-changing information about these persons; Used to access the record after creation
    Party.Builder
    partyId(Optional<String> partyId)
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single owner or control person on an account; A Party contains account-specific information about a person whereas inside the Party is a reference to a reusable instance of a Person `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` which contains non-changing information about these persons; Used to access the record after creation
    Party.Builder
    phoneNumber(PartyPhoneNumber phoneNumber)
    The phone number for a party.
    Party.Builder
    phoneNumber(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyPhoneNumber> phoneNumber)
    The phone number for a party.
    Party.Builder
    prospectusDeliveryPreference(PartyProspectusDeliveryPreference prospectusDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party.Builder
    prospectusDeliveryPreference(Optional<? extends PartyProspectusDeliveryPreference> prospectusDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party.Builder
    proxyDeliveryPreference(PartyProxyDeliveryPreference proxyDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for proxy voting for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party.Builder
    proxyDeliveryPreference(Optional<? extends PartyProxyDeliveryPreference> proxyDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for proxy voting for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party.Builder
    relationType(PartyRelationType relationType)
    Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.
    Party.Builder
    relationType(Optional<? extends PartyRelationType> relationType)
    Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.
    Party.Builder
    statementDeliveryPreference(PartyStatementDeliveryPreference statementDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party.Builder
    statementDeliveryPreference(Optional<? extends PartyStatementDeliveryPreference> statementDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party.Builder
    taxDocumentDeliveryPreference(PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference taxDocumentDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting
    Party.Builder
    taxDocumentDeliveryPreference(Optional<? extends PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference> taxDocumentDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting
    Party.Builder
    tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference(PartyTradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for trade confirmations for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party.Builder

    Delivery method instruction for trade confirmations for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

    • mailingAddress

      public Party.Builder mailingAddress(PartyMailingAddress mailingAddress)
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • mailingAddress

      public Party.Builder mailingAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyMailingAddress> mailingAddress)
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • name

      public Party.Builder name(String name)
      The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=party/*}

    • name

      public Party.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=party/*}

    • partyId

      public Party.Builder partyId(String partyId)
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single owner or control person on an account; A Party contains account-specific information about a person whereas inside the Party is a reference to a reusable instance of a Person `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` which contains non-changing information about these persons; Used to access the record after creation

    • partyId

      public Party.Builder partyId(Optional<String> partyId)
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single owner or control person on an account; A Party contains account-specific information about a person whereas inside the Party is a reference to a reusable instance of a Person `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` which contains non-changing information about these persons; Used to access the record after creation

    • phoneNumber

      public Party.Builder phoneNumber(PartyPhoneNumber phoneNumber)
      The phone number for a party. Lives on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person.

    • phoneNumber

      public Party.Builder phoneNumber(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyPhoneNumber> phoneNumber)
      The phone number for a party. Lives on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person.

    • prospectusDeliveryPreference

      public Party.Builder prospectusDeliveryPreference(PartyProspectusDeliveryPreference prospectusDeliveryPreference)
      Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

      Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

    • relationType

      public Party.Builder relationType(PartyRelationType relationType)
      Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.

      public Party.Builder relationType(Optional<? extends PartyRelationType> relationType)
      Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.

    • taxDocumentDeliveryPreference

      public Party.Builder taxDocumentDeliveryPreference(PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference taxDocumentDeliveryPreference)
      Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting

    • taxDocumentDeliveryPreference

      public Party.Builder taxDocumentDeliveryPreference(Optional<? extends PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference> taxDocumentDeliveryPreference)
      Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting
